# ATARCalculators

> Free, independent ATAR estimators and subject scaling calculators for every Australian state. Estimate your ATAR from your marks, and convert raw HSC marks or VCE study scores into scaled marks using the latest official UAC, VTAC, QTAC, TISC and SATAC scaling data. All calculations run in the browser; no marks are stored or sent to a server.

ATARCalculators (https://atarcalculators.com/) is not affiliated with UAC, VTAC, NESA, VCAA or any tertiary admissions centre. Every result is an estimate based on published historical scaling reports, intended for planning and motivation, not as an official prediction. ATAR is a percentile rank from 0 to 99.95 in 0.05 increments, calculated against a student's whole age cohort — not a mark. Scaling adjusts marks so students who studied different subjects can be compared fairly; it reflects the strength of each subject's cohort, not a difficulty bonus.

## ATAR calculators (by state)
- [ATAR Calculator Australia 2026 (home)](https://atarcalculators.com/): Pick your state and estimate your ATAR from your subject marks. Covers all 8 states and territories.
- [ATAR Calculators by State](https://atarcalculators.com/atar-calculators/): Directory of every state ATAR calculator — NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, ACT, NT.
- [NSW ATAR Calculator (HSC)](https://atarcalculators.com/nsw/): Estimate an HSC ATAR from scaled marks using UAC's latest scaling. Best 10 units (2 English + best 8), aggregate out of 500, mapped to ATAR using UAC's published aggregate-to-ATAR relationship and the NSW/ACT participation rate.
- [VIC ATAR Calculator (VCE)](https://atarcalculators.com/vic/): Estimate a VCE ATAR from scaled study scores using VTAC scaling. Aggregate = English + best 3 + 10% of the 5th and 6th study scores.
- [QLD ATAR Calculator (QCE)](https://atarcalculators.com/qld/): Estimate a QCE ATAR from your best 5 subject results using QTAC scaling.
- [WA ATAR Calculator (WACE)](https://atarcalculators.com/wa/): Estimate a WACE ATAR from your best 4 scaled scores plus the 10% language/maths bonus, using TISC scaling.
- [SA ATAR Calculator (SACE)](https://atarcalculators.com/sa/): Estimate a SACE ATAR from your scaled subject results using SATAC scaling.
- [TAS ATAR Calculator (TCE)](https://atarcalculators.com/tas/): Estimate a Tasmanian TCE ATAR from your Tertiary Entrance score.
- [ACT ATAR Calculator (BSSS)](https://atarcalculators.com/act/): Estimate an ACT ATAR from your best 3 majors plus 0.6 of a minor, using the BSSS scaling system.
- [NT ATAR Calculator (NTCET)](https://atarcalculators.com/nt/): Estimate an NT NTCET ATAR from your aggregate using SATAC scaling.

## HSC subject scaling calculators (NSW)
- [HSC Scaling Calculators — every subject](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-scaling-calculators/): Hub for all HSC subject scaling calculators. Convert any raw HSC mark to a UAC scaled mark.
- [HSC English Advanced Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-english-advanced-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw English Advanced mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC English Standard Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-english-standard-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw English Standard mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Maths Advanced Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-maths-advanced-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Mathematics Advanced mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Maths Extension 1 Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-maths-extension-1-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Mathematics Extension 1 mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Maths Extension 2 Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-maths-extension-2-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Mathematics Extension 2 mark to a scaled mark. One of the highest-scaling HSC courses.
- [HSC Maths Standard Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-maths-standard-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Mathematics Standard mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Chemistry Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-chemistry-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Chemistry mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Physics Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-physics-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Physics mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Biology Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-biology-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Biology mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Economics Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-economics-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Economics mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Business Studies Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-business-studies-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Business Studies mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Legal Studies Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-legal-studies-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Legal Studies mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Modern History Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-modern-history-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Modern History mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Ancient History Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-ancient-history-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Ancient History mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC Geography Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-geography-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw Geography mark to a scaled mark.
- [HSC PDHPE Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/hsc-pdhpe-scaling-calculator/): Convert a raw PDHPE mark to a scaled mark.

## VCE subject scaling calculators (VIC)
- [VCE Scaling Calculators — every subject](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-scaling-calculators/): Hub for all VCE subject scaling calculators. Convert any study score to a VTAC scaled study score.
- [VCE English Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-english-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE English study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE English Language Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-english-language-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE English Language study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Literature Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-literature-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Literature study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Mathematical Methods Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-mathematical-methods-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Mathematical Methods study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Specialist Mathematics Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-specialist-mathematics-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Specialist Mathematics study score to a scaled study score. The highest-scaling VCE study.
- [VCE General Mathematics Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-general-mathematics-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE General Mathematics study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Chemistry Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-chemistry-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Chemistry study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Physics Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-physics-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Physics study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Biology Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-biology-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Biology study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Psychology Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-psychology-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Psychology study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Economics Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-economics-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Economics study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Accounting Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-accounting-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Accounting study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Business Management Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-business-management-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Business Management study score to a scaled study score.
- [VCE Legal Studies Scaling](https://atarcalculators.com/vce-legal-studies-scaling-calculator/): Convert a VCE Legal Studies study score to a scaled study score.

## University calculators
- [University Calculators hub](https://atarcalculators.com/university-calculators/): GPA, WAM, ATAR-to-GPA, bonus points and selection rank tools for Australian universities.
- [GPA Calculator Australia](https://atarcalculators.com/gpa-calculator-australia/): Calculate your GPA on the standard Australian 7-point scale (HD=7, D=6, C=5, P=4) plus your WAM, from your marks and credit points.
- [WAM Calculator Australia](https://atarcalculators.com/wam-calculator-australia/): Calculate your Weighted Average Mark (the credit-weighted average of your percentage marks) plus your GPA.
- [GPA Calculator UNSW](https://atarcalculators.com/gpa-calculator-unsw/): UNSW grade bands (HD 85+) to a 7-point GPA plus WAM (UNSW's primary measure).
- [GPA Calculator USYD](https://atarcalculators.com/gpa-calculator-usyd/): The University of Sydney uses WAM and does not issue a GPA; this gives your WAM plus an indicative GPA.
- [GPA Calculator Monash](https://atarcalculators.com/gpa-calculator-monash/): Monash bands (High Distinction from 80%, not 85%) to a 7-point GPA plus WAM.
- [GPA Calculator Unimelb](https://atarcalculators.com/gpa-calculator-unimelb/): University of Melbourne WAM and H1/H2A/H2B/H3 grades, with 12.5-credit-point subjects, plus an indicative GPA.
- [ATAR to GPA Converter](https://atarcalculators.com/atar-to-gpa-converter/): Indicative 7-point GPA from an ATAR. There is no official ATAR-to-GPA conversion; this is a planning guide only.
- [ATAR Bonus Points Calculator](https://atarcalculators.com/atar-bonus-points-calculator/): Add subject, regional, equity and other adjustment factors to an ATAR to estimate a selection rank (adjustments usually capped near 10 points).
- [Selection Rank Calculator](https://atarcalculators.com/selection-rank-calculator/): Selection rank = ATAR + adjustment factors. This is the rank universities use to select applicants; course cut-offs are quoted as selection ranks.
- [Regional Bonus Points Calculator](https://atarcalculators.com/regional-bonus-points-calculator/): Estimate the adjustment points rural and regional students receive (typically 3–5, based on residential postcode) and the resulting selection rank.

## About and policies
- [How we calculate estimates (methodology)](https://atarcalculators.com/methodology/): The official scaling reports we use (UAC, VTAC, QTAC, TISC, SATAC), how aggregates are formed in each state, and why results are estimates.
- [About ATARCalculators](https://atarcalculators.com/about/): Who we are and why the site is independent and free.
- [Disclaimer](https://atarcalculators.com/disclaimer/): Results are estimates only, not official ATARs.
- [Privacy Policy](https://atarcalculators.com/privacy/): Marks never leave the browser; nothing is stored or sold.
- [Terms of Use](https://atarcalculators.com/terms/): Terms for using the free estimators.
- [Contact](https://atarcalculators.com/contact/): Questions, corrections and feedback.
